assertions.title: CLI reject command sends TaskReject and daemon processes it

steps.expected: Tests verify: (1) TaskReject for nonexistent task returns error, (2) TaskReject for task in wrong state returns error

evidence.testOutput:
running 2 tests
test test_task_reject_nonexistent_returns_error ... ok

test result: ok. 2 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 8 filtered out; finished in 0.11s

summary: Tested VAL-API-006 (CLI reject command sends TaskReject and daemon processes it): 2 tests passed. The tests verify: (1) sending TaskReject for a nonexistent task returns an error containing 'not found', (2) sending TaskReject for a task in wrong state (Created) returns error about 'Cannot reject task'. Both rejection scenarios correctly return DaemonEvent::Error from the daemon.
